2026-02-27T01:44:52.8549286Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-02-27T01:44:52.8549566Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-02-27T01:44:52.8549712Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-02-27T01:44:52.8549930Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-02-27T01:44:52.8550260Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-02-27T01:44:52.8550382Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-02-27T01:44:52.8550522Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-02-27T01:44:52.8550622Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-02-27T01:44:52.8550817Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-02-27T01:44:52.8550894Z [36;1mfi[0m
